item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A'
catalog=\""'$root/catalog.json"
handoff="$root/docs/handoff.md"

actual=$(find "$root" -type f -print | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$catalog" "$handoff" | sort)
test "$actual" = "$expected" && test ! -e "$root/incoming/catalog-seed.json"
printf '"'RA-R01 PASS exact_files=%s seed=absent\\n' \""'$(printf '"'%s' \""'$actual" | tr '"'\\n' ',' | sed 's/,"'$//'"')\"

jq -e '(keys|sort)==[\"items\",\"owner\",\"schema_version\"] and (.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and .schema_version==1' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R02 PASS json=valid top_level_keys=items,owner,schema_version schema_version=1 schema_type=number'

jq -e '(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"release\"' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
if rg -n -i -F '"'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; fi
echo '"'RA-R03 PASS owner=release owner_type=string abandoned_owner_matches=0'

jq -e '(.items|type)==\"array\" and (.items|length)==2 and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and all(.items[]; (.name|type)==\"string\" and (.enabled|type)==\"boolean\" and .enabled==true)' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R04 PASS items_type=array order=alpha,beta enabled=true,true enabled_types=boolean,boolean'

jq -e '([..|objects|has(\"notes\")]|any|not)' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R05 PASS notes_fields=0'

words="'$(wc -w < "$handoff" | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$words" -le 50
phrase=$(rg -n -F '"'source of truth' \""'$handoff")
if rg -n -i '"'("'^|[''^[:alnum:]_])(timestamp|datestamp)([''^[:alnum:]_]|$)|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{2,4}|[0-9]{1,2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2})?|January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December'"' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'RA-R06 PASS handoff_words=%s phrase_match=%s forbidden_date_time_matches=0\\n' \""'$words" "$phrase"'

item.aggregated_output:
RA-R01 PASS exact_files=longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json,longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md seed=absent
RA-R02 PASS json=valid top_level_keys=items,owner,schema_version schema_version=1 schema_type=number
RA-R03 PASS owner=release owner_type=string abandoned_owner_matches=0
RA-R04 PASS items_type=array order=alpha,beta enabled=true,true enabled_types=boolean,boolean
RA-R05 PASS notes_fields=0
RA-R06 PASS handoff_words=36 phrase_match=3:Operators should treat `catalog.json` as the source of truth for catalog ownership, item order, and enabled state. Process items from top to bottom and update the catalog directly when an item's state changes. forbidden_date_time_matches=0

item.text:
| ID | Current requirement | Fresh evidence |
|---|---|---|
| RA-R01 | Exactly the two requested artifacts; no substitute seed | `PASS exact_files=.../catalog.json,.../docs/handoff.md seed=absent` |
| RA-R02 | Valid JSON; exact top-level fields; numeric schema version `1` | `PASS json=valid top_level_keys=items,owner,schema_version schema_version=1 schema_type=number` |
| RA-R03 | Owner is string `release`; abandoned `ops` absent | `PASS owner=release owner_type=string abandoned_owner_matches=0` |
| RA-R04 | Items ordered `alpha`, `beta`; both enabled JSON booleans | `PASS items_type=array order=alpha,beta enabled=true,true enabled_types=boolean,boolean` |
| RA-R05 | No `notes` field anywhere in JSON | `PASS notes_fields=0` |
| RA-R06 | Compact handoff with literal `source of truth`; no timestamps/datestamps | `PASS handoff_words=36 ... forbidden_date_time_matches=0` |
